content: cross-rs requires Docker or Podman. Main pitfalls: (1) native C deps still compile for host arch, causing EM_AARCH64 vs EM_X86_64 linker errors at link time; (2) CC_aarch64_unknown_linux_gnu env var must be set explicitly for any build.rs that invokes a C compiler; (3) binfmt_misc needed for cross-testing but not cross-building; (4) Docker socket must be accessible from CI runner.
